mapper.select: SELECT DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, PARENT_ID, LEVEL_NO, SORT_ORDER FROM DEPT WHERE ENABLED = TRUE ORDER BY LEVEL_NO, SORT_ORDER

WITH RECURSIVE DEPT_TREE (DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, PARENT_ID, LEVEL_NO, SORT_ORDER, PATH) AS ( SELECT DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, PARENT_ID, 1, SORT_ORDER, CAST(DEPT_ID AS VARCHAR(500)) FROM DEPT WHERE PARENT_ID IS NULL AND ENABLED = TRUE UNION ALL SELECT d.DEPT_ID, d.DEPT_NAME, d.PARENT_ID, t.LEVEL_NO + 1, d.SORT_ORDER, CAST(t.PATH || '/' || d.DEPT_ID AS VARCHAR(500)) FROM DEPT d JOIN DEPT_TREE t ON d.PARENT_ID = t.DEPT_ID WHERE d.ENABLED = TRUE ) SELECT * FROM DEPT_TREE ORDER BY PATH
